arguments.description: line color, filled shapes have an extra first interior color
(x, y) pairs giving coordinates of each vertex

flags.name: -v <symbol>
flags.description: assigns a field to make it visible/invisible

flags.name: -xr
flags.description: disable mouse actions when in "run" mode

flags.name: -xe
flags.description: disable mouse actions when in "edit" mode

flags.name: -x
flags.description: set both "-xr" and "-xe", disabling all mouse actions

flags.name: -xv
flags.description: disable dragging vertices when in "run" mode (keeps reporting mouse clicks)
